steps.title: Refer to the whole event
steps.content: The blank points back to the singular event described in the first clause: Lê Lương Minh becoming secretary-general in January 2013. The pronoun must treat that event as one thing.

steps.title: Use a singular pronoun
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B are plural, so they do not agree with the singular event. Choice D is indefinite and leaves the reference unclear. The sentence needs a singular pronoun for “making this the first time.” The answer is C.
